description: Estate account for a deceased individual with court-appointed executor and probate documents reviewed
parsed_text:
ESTATE ACCOUNT ONBOARDING — CUSTOMER DUE DILIGENCE
Account Title: Estate of Harold T. Vickers
Customer Type: Other (Estate)
Estate TIN (FEIN): XX-XXX6614
Deceased's Name: Harold Thomas Vickers
Date of Death: 2025-08-14
Probate Court: Maricopa County Superior Court, Arizona — Probate Case No. PB-2025-XXXX3301

EXECUTOR INFORMATION (Account Controller)
Executor Name: Patricia Vickers-Hammond
Relationship to Deceased: Adult Daughter
DOB: 1975-03-09   SSN: XXX-XX-5503
Address: 7812 E. Pinnacle Peak Road, Scottsdale, AZ 85255, USA
Phone: (480) 555-0133   Email: p.hammond@example.com
Occupation: Attorney at Law (Vickers & Hammond LLP, Phoenix AZ)

IDENTITY DOCUMENTS (EXECUTOR)
ID Type: Driver License   ID Number: DL-AZ-XX3317   Expiration: 2029-01-31

ESTATE ASSETS (Approximate)
Probate assets: Brokerage account ($412,000), residential property — 7812 E. Pinnacle Peak Rd (value TBD by appraisal), personal property.
Source of Funds: Deceased's accumulated savings, investment portfolio, and home equity.
Expected Monthly Activity: $35,000 (estate administration distributions, investment liquidations)

DOCUMENTS REVIEWED
- Letters Testamentary issued by Maricopa County Superior Court, dated 2025-09-02 — authenticated and on file.
- Death Certificate: Arizona Department of Health and Human Services, Certificate No. AZ-DEATH-XXXX7741 — reviewed.
- Last Will and Testament: Copy on file; Patricia Vickers-Hammond named sole executor.
- Probate Inventory: Filed with court 2025-09-25.

SCREENING RESULTS
OFAC / SDN (Executor): Clear.
PEP Check (Executor): Patricia Vickers-Hammond — no PEP flag. Private attorney, not a public official.
Adverse Media: Clear for both decedent and executor.

RISK ASSESSMENT
PEP Status: No
High-Risk Factors: None. Estate account with documented probate authority, domestic assets, clear chain of authority.
Risk Rating: Low
CDD Level: Standard
Compliance Notes: Estate account — beneficial ownership rule not applicable (no ongoing business entity). Executor identity verified and legal authority confirmed via court documents.
Review Date: 2025-10-08   Reviewer: Angela Pryce

expected_json.source_of_funds: Deceased's accumulated savings, investment portfolio, and home equity
